prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SSMFUPKWCP-2PC Product Type: MULTITOOL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Stainless Steel Multi-tool Utility EDC Pocket Knife with Carry Pouch Description: Are you in need of a compact and reliable multi-tool for everyday carry? Then the ASR Outdoor Multi-tool Pocket Knife is a great option. Our pocket knife is constructed of high-quality stainless steel that is durable, sturdy, and won't rust so you can count on it rain or shine. In addition to functioning as a knife, it has a number of other useful functions - wood saw, fish scaler with hook disgorger, scissors, can opener, bottle opener, and flathead screwdriver.

Designed with safety in mind, features a secure folding mechanism that will hold the blade in place when not in use. It also has a quick-change blade mechanism so you can easily utilize and release the knife for quick deployment. The blade will lock in tightly to help prevent injury during use.

The ASR Outdoor folding utility knife is compact and lightweight, making it ideal for men or women. It also comes with a convenient nylon carry pouch with a belt loop so you can attach it to your belt for easy access. This is a great EDC pocket knife option. Search Terms: knife pocket utility folding set stainless steel heavy duty blades multi-tool knives for men multi function Features: - HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - The ASR Outdoor utility pocket knife is constructed of high-quality stainless steel that is durable, sturdy, and won't rust so you can count on it rain or shine. - MULTI-FUNCTION TOOL - Our utility pocket knife has 17 different functions including a blade, sharp wood saw, fish scaler with hook disgorger, scissors, can opener, bottle opener, and a flathead screwdriver, making this the perfect everyday carry tool. - SAFE DESIGN - This pocket knife is designed to keep the blade and tools in place when not in use. It features a secure folding mechanism that will ensure that you don't accidentally open it from within your pocket. - QUICK CHANGE BLADE - The pocket knife also features a quick-change blade mechanism so you can easily utilize and release the knife for quick deployment. The blade will also lock in tightly to help prevent injury during use. - LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE - The ASR Outdoor folding utility tool is compact and lightweight, making it ideal for men or women. It comes with a convenient nylon carry pouch with a belt loop so you can attach it to your belt for easy access. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Multi-tool Pocket Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Multi-Tool Utility EDC Pocket Knife

tokens.name: Stainless Steel Multi-Tool Utility EDC Pocket Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 17 Functions, Quick-Change Blade, Secure Folding, Includes Carry Pouch, Rust-Resistant

openai.title_differentiation: 17-In-1 Functions, Stainless Steel Construction, Quick-Change Locking Blade, Nylon Belt Pouch, Rust Resistant, Compact EDC
